Title: st_astext
Description: Returns the well known text (WKT) representation of the geometry.
Returns the well known text (WKT) representation of the geometry.
Examples:
SQL>SPARQL
SELECT DISTINCT (bif:st_astext(?geo))
WHERE
  {
    ?m geo:geometry ?geo .
  }
LIMIT 10;
